calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Trial. No appearance by Defendant(s).
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(S) MARIA SOLIS.
Court takes Judicial Notice of Order re: Motion to Compel filed February 3, 2015.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC and against Defendant Maria Solis as follows:
Principal $1,803.84
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $444.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $2,248.79
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Compel, as follows: Plaintiff's motion to compel defendant's response to plaintiff's first set of special interrogatories is granted. All objections are waived. Defendant to serve verified responses in compliance with CCP 2030.210-250 no later than March 2, 2015. Defendant's motion to compel defendant's response to plaintiffs first set of requests for production of documents is granted. All objections are waived. Defendant to serve verified responses and produce documents in compliance with CCP 2031.210-260 no later than March 2, 2015. Defendant's motion to have Plaintiff's Request for Admissions Set#1 be deemed admitted is granted. The Court modified and signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted is Off calendar. No courtesy copies of the moving papers were provided to the court despite a request by the Judge Pro Tem on Friday for copies of the papers. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
